notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop CJ Abrams. JJ Wetherholt scores. Alec Burleson to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop CJ Abrams. JJ Wetherholt scores. Alec Burleson to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Joey Wiemer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cardinals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Joey Wiemer grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Daylen Lile out at 2nd. Joey Wiemer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams steals (4) 2nd base. CJ Abrams to 3rd. CJ Abrams advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Pedro Pagés.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. flies out sharply to center fielder Nathan Church.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Riley O'Brien. Daylen Lile scores. Jorbit Vivas to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop CJ Abrams. JJ Wetherholt scores. Alec Burleson to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Thomas Saggese GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Thomas Saggese grounds into a double play, third baseman Brady House to first baseman Curtis Mead. Nolan Gorman out at 3rd. Masyn Winn to 2nd. Thomas Saggese out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Thomas Saggese rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Thomas Saggese grounds into a double play, third baseman Brady House to first baseman Curtis Mead. Nolan Gorman out at 3rd. Masyn Winn to 2nd. Thomas Saggese out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn plunked
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn hit by pitch. Nolan Gorman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Curtis Mead. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohel Pozo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yohel Pozo flies out to right fielder Joey Wiemer.
